generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing vehicle state data including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring motor status and performance"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring steering servo position and control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTrackSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing object tracks data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance MotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
]

instance SteeringServoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ObjectTrackSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data after clustering and translation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed vehicle state data including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance MotorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed motor status data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SteeringServoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed steering servo position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringServoDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point cloud data into structured object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for all data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2CommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables communication between software components via ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance UDPCommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables inter-entity communication via Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI for real-time viewing, saving, and generating reports of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeViewingInsight, SaveDataAction, GenerateReportAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance) from vehicle to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, OffloadComputationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables/disables ACC, sets desired speed, and sends emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmd, DisableACCCmd, SetDesiredSpeedCmd, EmergencyBrakingCmd
]

instance RealTimeViewingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance SaveDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saves vehicle state data to storage"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates reports from collected vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance OffloadComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation tasks to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables Adaptive Cruise Control remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables Adaptive Cruise Control remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed for ACC remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCmd : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    base:contains LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor, MotorSensor, SteeringServoSensor, ObjectTrackSensor, PointCloudClusteringEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler, ROS2CommunicationEnabler, UDPCommunicationEnabler, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, RealTimeViewingInsight, SaveDataAction, GenerateReportAction, LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, OffloadComputationAction, EnableACCCmd, DisableACCCmd, SetDesiredSpeedCmd, EmergencyBrakingCmd
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization with 100 ms accuracy is required for device coordination in safety-critical vehicular applications due to hardware limitations, despite industry standards mandating stricter synchronization thresholds for computation offloading."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via ROS2 middleware where each Functional Entity (FE) is implemented as individual ROS2 packages containing ROS2 nodes, adhering to ISO 23247 RA entity-based structure across distinct hardware deployments for Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2; inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi network with UDP transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to the ISO 23247 standard for manufacturing, which defines a reference architecture (Part 2) comprising entities such as Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs), Data Collection and Device Control Entities for data acquisition and control, Digital Twin Entities for digital representation, and User Entities for human interaction. The standard's four parts include Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Functional Entities (FEs) within each entity handle specific tasks like actuation, data transformation, and user interface, though implementation details are not prescribed by the standard, allowing flexibility with technologies such as OPC Unified Architecture."
]
